_notes: Synthesized off Step-2 spike (data/fixtures/oisst/point-sample.json::near_coast_null_example). Input: lat=40.0, lon=-100.0 (middle of Kansas). lon_erddap = 260.0. Snapped grid centre: lat=40.125, lon_erddap=260.125 -> snappedLon=-99.875. SST column is JSON null because the cell is pure land (ERDDAP returns a well-formed envelope with null, NOT an HTTP 404). This must be treated as status='no_data' in normalize().
